name: task-os
description: Personal task management system with Claude AI integration
author: Justin Handley

scripts.kill: pkill -9 -f 'Electron.app/Contents/MacOS/Electron' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'electron electron-main.js' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'node mcp/http-server.js' 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.mcp: echo '⚠️  Standalone MCP (system Node). Do NOT use while Electron app is running — run npm run electron-dev instead, which manages MCP automatically. Run npm run rebuild:electron before restarting the app after this.' && npm run rebuild:node && node mcp/http-server.js
scripts.electron-dev: npm run kill && npm run rebuild:electron && sleep 1 && NODE_ENV=development concurrently --names vite,electron --prefix-colors green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix ui" "./node_modules/.bin/electron electron-main.js"
scripts.restart: npm run kill && sleep 1 && NODE_ENV=development ./node_modules/.bin/electron electron-main.js
scripts.start: npm run kill && sleep 1 && NODE_ENV=production ./node_modules/.bin/electron electron-main.js
